data.title: Rio2 reports first gold pour at Fenix Gold Mine in Chile on Jan 23, 2026. Mine is 100% owned by Rio2.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Rio2 Limited, trading as RIO on the Toronto Stock Exchange, RIOFF on the OTCQX, and RIO on the BVL, reported the successful inaugural gold pour at its Fenix Gold Mine in Chile. This marks a significant milestone for Rio2 as it signifies the commencement of gold production at Fenix Gold, which is entirely owned by the company. The event took place in Chile and holds importance for the future operations and financial outcomes of Rio2 Limited.

data.title: $750M in long positions liquidated during weekend slide as Bitcoin prices hit $88K amid Japan's financial turmoil.
data.description: A recent surge in crypto liquidations resulted in long positions facing significant losses, amounting to a total of $750 million. This occurred as cryptocurrency prices experienced a decline, dropping towards $88,000. The market turmoil in Japan's financial sector further contributed to the overall instability.

data.title: Dr. Navid Hafez appointed Director of Clinical Research at new LA site at Los Angeles Cancer Network, part of largest oncology practice.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Dr. Hafez is set to head the latest early-phase research site at the Los Angeles Cancer Network, a prominent community-based oncology practice in the U.S. This announcement was made on Jan. 26, 2026. The Los Angeles Cancer Network is recognized as one of the nation's leading and most varied oncology practices. The START Center for Cancer Research ("START") has been identified as the world's largest establishment dedicated to this cause.

data.title: Delta Dental of California offers new resources to help dentists spot patients at risk for heart disease.
data.description: A recent news release announced by Delta Dental of California on Nov 18, 2025, revealed new resources to assist dentists in identifying patients at risk for cardiovascular disease. The company highlighted changes made to improve patient care. These resources aim to enhance early detection of cardiovascular issues, benefiting approximately 10,000 dentists in California. The update provides crucial information to aid in the early diagnosis of dental patients susceptible to heart conditions, underlining the significance of dental professionals in preventative healthcare. The initiative demonstrates Delta Dental's commitment to promoting overall health awareness within the community.

data.title: Mercanis awarded 2025 European Agentic AI Product Leadership by Frost & Sullivan for transforming digital procurement.
data.description: Mercanis has received accolades from Frost & Sullivan for their exceptional product innovation, customer-centric approach, and leadership in AI within the realm of digital procurement throughout Europe. The recognition was announced on January 26, 2026, with the prominent company being awarded the prestigious 2025 European award for their outstanding contributions to the industry.

data.title: Peter Piper Pizza brings back heart-shaped pizza, $1 from each sold goes to Children's Miracle Network in AZ, CA, NM, TX.
data.description: Peter Piper Pizza's heart-shaped pizza promotion is back for the third year in a row, with $1 from each purchase going towards the Children's Miracle Network in Arizona, California, New Mexico, and Texas. Running until March 1, customers can enjoy the special pizza while supporting a good cause. The initiative aims to raise funds to help children in need, with the goal of making a positive impact in these states. Last year, the campaign raised a total of $XX,XXX for the Children's Miracle Network.

data.title: Estrella Galicia 0,0 sponsors MotoGP Grand Prix of Brazil, extending their commitment to sport.
data.description: In A CORUÑA, Spain, on January 26, 2026, Estrella Galicia 0,0 embarks on a new season in the MotoGP World Championship. The company reinforces its dedication to the sport by becoming the title sponsor of the Grand Prix of Brazil. This sponsorship adds to their existing partnerships in the championship, highlighting their ongoing support.

data.title: Aligned Automation sponsors professional golfers Cole Sherwood, Dillon Stewart, and Kaleiya Romero.
data.description: Today, a global professional technology services company, Aligned Automation, disclosed their sponsorship of professional golfers Cole Sherwood and Dillon Stewart. The company is renowned for accelerating excellence via intelligent operations and data-driven solutions, powered by artificial intelligence. The announcement was made in Dallas on Jan. 26, 2026.

data.title: Ruder Finn acquires Missouri Creative, enhancing global brand experience w/ 2D, 3D design expertise. NY, Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: In a move to enhance its capabilities, Ruder Finn's RF Studio53 division has recently acquired Missouri Creative, a UK company specializing in immersive 2D, 3D, and experiential design. This acquisition aims to bolster RF Studio53's global brand platform. Ruder Finn, known as one of the leading independent marketing and communications agencies globally, has positioned itself with this strategic acquisition. The deal, finalized on January 26, 2026, is set to bring together Missouri Creative's specialized design expertise with Ruder Finn's extensive resources, creating new opportunities for growth and innovation in the industry.

data.title: Global Bioremediation Technology & Services market valued at US$58.6 Billion in 2024, projected to reach US$87.5 Billion by 2030, growing at 6.9% CAGR.
data.description: Dublin - A new report on Bioremediation Technology & Services has been released by ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for Bioremediation Technology & Services was worth US$58.6 billion in 2024 and is estimated to reach US$87.5 billion by 2030, with a projected growth rate of 6.9% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and future forecasts to assist in making well-informed business decisions.

data.title: Canadian auto sector hit by U.S. trade policy, pressuring agreement allowing Chinese car sales, harming U.S. automakers.
data.description: The Canadian auto industry has witnessed significant impact due to U.S. trade policies, leading the country to negotiate an agreement facilitating an easier entry for Chinese auto companies to sell cars there.

data.title: USD1 stablecoin from World Liberty Financial surpasses PayPal's PYUSD, as announced by Eric Trump, marking a significant milestone in the digital dollar realm. Eric Trump stated that the shift towards USD1 is occurring.
data.description: Eric Trump announced that USD1, the stablecoin issued by World Liberty Financial, has surpassed PayPal Holdings Inc.'s PYUSD stablecoin in size, marking a significant milestone. He emphasized this achievement as a crucial phase in the evolution of digital currencies, stating, "The shift is happening." Eric Trump further highlighted the growth of USD1, positioning it as one of the leading digital dollar platforms globally. He stressed that this advancement signifies more than just a crypto milestone, as it indicates a progression towards shaping the future of global finances. The announcement was made on January 23, 2026, and the full details are accessible via Benzinga.com.

data.title: Compare train vs. plane costs; Amtrak benefits from dynamic pricing. Passengers complain at high last-minute fares.[train emoji] has advantage of skipping airport.
data.description: Amtrak has reported that the implementation of dynamic pricing has significantly improved its financial performance. However, many travelers express dissatisfaction with the high prices, particularly for last-minute bookings. Despite this, Amtrak has a significant advantage in its ability to bypass the airport hassle.

data.title: Market analysis report on North America B2C & B2B E-Commerce, Payments & AI until 2026. Wallet usage rises, cards lead in revenue.
data.description: A report titled "North America B2C & B2B E-Commerce, Payments & AI" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report delves into the impact of digital commerce, the changing payments sector, artificial intelligence, and B2B online trading on retail, financial services, and corporate functions in North America. It provides detailed insights into market growth, transaction platforms, consumer and business patterns, AI incorporation, and cross-sector trends.

data.title: Advyzon partners with Schwab Asset Management, offering Wasmer Schroeder Strategies, providing broad range of portfolio strategies.
data.description: In Chicago, AIM, a unified investment solutions platform under Advyzon, has partnered with Schwab Asset Management® to offer Wasmer Schroeder® Strategies. This collaboration introduces a range of portfolio strategies encompassing duration, credit, and tax-efficiency options. Wasmer Schroeder Strategies by Schwab Asset Management is the initial fixed income-focused addition to Advyzon's wealthtech platform.

data.title: $1.81bn AI drug discovery market to reach $41.08bn by 2040: ResearchAndMarkets.com. CAGR of 25%; driven by innovations.
data.description: A report on the AI in Drug Discovery Market predicts significant expansion, with the global market expected to grow from $1.81 billion in the current year to $41.08 billion by 2040, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 25%. Innovations such as virtual screening, predictive modeling, and others are driving this growth. The report covers the distribution by drug discovery steps, therapeutic areas, and key geographical regions. It highlights industry trends and global forecasts in this sector.

data.title: Yolando, a GEO platform, launches commercially with $8.5M funding from Drive Capital to help companies improve visibility.
data.description: Yolando, a competitive intelligence and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) platform, has officially launched in Toronto with a total funding of $8.5 million USD from Drive Capital. The platform aids companies in enhancing their visibility on AI platforms and traditional search by analyzing how they are featured in AI-generated responses. Yolando offers continuous monitoring of competitors, strategic suggestions, and generates on-brand content to help companies improve their online presence.

data.title: Marketing expert Charles R. Taylor available to discuss trends in 2026 Super Bowl ads, set to cost record $8M for 30 sec.
data.description: In Villanova, Pennsylvania, Professor Charles R. Taylor from the Villanova School of Business is ready to analyze the latest trends influencing the upcoming Super Bowl advertising blitz. With brands gearing up to shell out a historic $8 million for just half a minute of airtime during the event, the stakes are higher than ever. This record-breaking expenditure will undoubtedly shape the advertising strategies and campaign dynamics observed during this year's big game.
